_readme: Program honors — VERIFIED from official MCLA sources only. Empty lists stay hidden. Never add a year, name, or title that isn't confirmed by a source. Sources are kept in _sources for reference.
_titlesNote: SELC Tournament Championships would go here as { "label": "SELC Tournament Champions", "years": [..] }. None found in the record as of 2026 — left empty (hidden) until/unless one is won.

awards.label: GSU Club Sports Coach of the Year

_awardsNote: The GSU campus Club Sports award (distinct from SELC Coach of the Year). Self-reported by the club. Fill in the coach's name; an entry with an empty name is hidden until the name is added.

postseason.label: SELC Division II Playoffs
postseason.note: Five straight appearances (2022–2026). Won the 2026 first round over Florida Gulf Coast, 18–12.
